label: Project Index
summary: Quick reference guide: which file to read for any given task, plus data flow diagram and key invariants.

label: Project Context
summary: Shared project brain: confirmed direction, constraints, open questions, and latest progress.

label: Project Log
summary: Dated logbook of what happened, what changed, and what should happen next.

label: Product Spec
summary: High-level product definition, MVP scope, goals, non-goals, and open product decisions.

label: Function List
summary: Planned modules and function responsibilities across the whole product.

label: Development Sequence
summary: Phased implementation order so the project grows in a controlled way.

label: Development Rules
summary: Non-negotiable build rules: local-first, truthful output, deterministic-first logic, and tests.

label: Data Contract
summary: MVP data shapes, required vs optional fields, unknown handling, blockers, and decision outputs.

label: UI Scope
summary: Defines the minimal local UI for MVP, its workflow boundaries, and what it should not become.

label: Architecture Guardrails
summary: Pre-implementation architecture discipline: state separation, module boundaries, input handling rules, and policy configuration principles.

label: Viewer README
summary: How to run, stop, and manage the local docs viewer. Use viewer.sh for start/stop/status/restart control, or run the HTTP server directly.

label: Team Protocol
summary: SilverHand / Handy / Scout roles, QA scoring framework, lean communication rules, and anti-idle workflow.
